customStyle.description: Return a React CSSProperties object. Use camelCase keys and quoted string values.

customVisibility.description: Return true to show the component, false to hide it.

customEnabled.description: Return true to enable the component, false to disable it.

onChangeCustom.description: Called when the field value changes. value holds the new value.

onBlurCustom.description: Called when the field loses focus.

onClickCustom.description: Called when the component is clicked.

onFocusCustom.description: Called when the field gains focus.

onSelectCustom.description: Called when an option is selected.

style.description: Return a React CSSProperties object applied to the field wrapper.

wrapperStyle.description: Return a React CSSProperties object applied to the outer wrapper.

stylingBox.description: Return a styling configuration object for the component box.

onInitialized.description: Called once when the form is initialised.

onDataLoaded.description: Called after form data is loaded.

onValuesUpdate.description: Called when any field value changes.

onBeforeDataLoad.description: Called before form data is fetched.

onAfterDataLoad.description: Called after form data has been fetched and set.

onPrepareSubmitData.description: Return the final payload object to submit. Must be async.

onBeforeSubmit.description: Called before the form submits. Must be async.

onSubmitSuccess.description: Called after a successful form submission. Must be async.

preparedValues.description: Return the prepared values object before display.

displayValueFunc.description: Receives the selected item object; return the string to display.

filterKeysFunc.description: Return an array of property keys to include in the search payload.

keyValueFunc.description: Receives the selected item; return the key value to store.

outcomeValueFunc.description: Transform the selected item into the value stored on the form.

reducerFunc.description: Receives the raw items list; return a transformed array of { label, value } items.

disabledDateFunc.description: Receives current (moment); return true to disable that date.

outcomeCustomJs.description: Transform the selected value before it is stored on the form.

incomeCustomJs.description: Transform the incoming stored value before displaying it in the picker.

outcomeCustomJs.description: Transform the picked entity before storing it on the form.

reducerFunc.description: Receives the raw items list; return a transformed array of { label, value } items.

onCreated.description: Called after the sub-form entity is created successfully.

onUpdated.description: Called after the sub-form entity is updated successfully.
